description: Get if the current machine is an official server or is connected to one.
examples:
<sqf>
if (onOfficialServer) then
{
	systemChat "I am safe here! Wait, why is this bush crawling towards me";
};
</sqf>
name: onOfficialServer

ret.desc: [[true]] if the machine is an official server or is connected to one, [[false]] otherwise (e.g disconnected or single player)
